name: centris-scraper
description: Production-ready web scraper for Centris.ca real estate listings

scripts.scheduler: npm run build && npm run start:scheduler
scripts.test: tsx tests/parser-listing-bug.test.ts && tsx tests/telegram-format.test.ts && tsx tests/telegram-service.test.ts && tsx tests/notification-outbox.test.ts && tsx tests/helpers.test.ts && tsx tests/logger.test.ts && tsx tests/run-lock.test.ts && tsx tests/failure-alert.test.ts && tsx tests/scheduler.test.ts && tsx tests/run-once.test.ts && tsx tests/api-server.test.ts && tsx tests/metrics-store.test.ts && tsx tests/health-store.test.ts && tsx tests/resilience-cache.test.ts && tsx tests/service-retry-metrics.test.ts && tsx tests/rate-limiter-audit.test.ts && tsx tests/run-observability.test.ts && tsx tests/config-doctor.test.ts
